D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

SLIC Superpixels — k-Means in Lab+xy

Simple Linear Iterative Clustering (Achanta 2010): k-means in 5D Lab+xy coordinates produces compact, edge-aware regions for downstream CV pipelines

SLIC replaces per-pixel processing with hundreds of perceptually coherent superpixels. The 5D distance weights spatial vs colour error via m; high m → blob-like, low m → texture-following. Used as a CV preprocessor: segmentation, optical flow, saliency, even neural-net pre-tokenisation.

Slide expected superpixel count.
